title: Google’s New AI Just Broke The AI Speed Limit: DiffusionGemma
summary: Google released DiffusionGemma, an open AI model that generates text using a novel approach and runs up to four times faster on dedicated GPUs. It features a 256-token canvas and self-correction capabilities.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, an open model from Google that generates text through a diffusion-based approach rather than conventional autoregressive decoding. The key claims: it runs up to four times faster on dedicated GPUs, uses a 256-token canvas, and includes self-correction during generation. The diffusion method matters because it applies image-style generation techniques to text, which underlies the reported speed gains.
